name: Redshift
short_description: Craft and upgrade the ultimate ship and survive an onslaught of enemies in this top down, rogue-lite shooter.
detailed_description:
Upgrade the ultimate ship and survive an onslaught of enemies in this top down, rogue-lite shooter. In Redshift, it is not a question of whether you will survive but for how long.

Choosing the right ship is important, each one has different stats that will change the way that you play the game. Compliment your ship with the right weapons and upgrades in order to survive for as long as you can. A diverse range of enemies will try, and inevitably succeed, to take you down.

Redshift features a story mode where your objective is to survive until all of the waves are completed in order to face up to and beat the boss. In the story mode you'll unlock new ships and weapons that you can use in the endless mode.

Endless mode is, as the name suggests, a survival mode where you'll be expected to survive for as long as possible.

Features

  • Story mode - Try to survive until the game ends to unlock upgrades

  • Endless mode - Survive for as long as you can against endless waves of enemies

  • Many different ways to upgrade your ship and its weapons by collecting experience

  • Lots of different enemy types

  • Steam achievements coinciding with in-game unlocks

  • Focus on avoiding enemy fire with auto-firing weapons

  • Local co-operative / Remote Play Together
